import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms'; @Component({ selector: 'app-reservation-form', templateUrl: './reservation-form.component.html', styleUrls: ['./reservation-form.component.css'] }) export class ReservationFormComponent { reservationForm: FormGroup; constructor(private formBuilder: FormBuilder) { this.reservationForm = this.formBuilder.group({ guestName: ['', Validators.required], guestEmail: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.email]], checkInDate: ['', Validators.required], checkOutDate: ['', Validators.required] }); } onSubmit() { if (this.reservationForm.valid) { console.log(this.reservationForm.value); } } }
Name is required.
Please enter a valid email.
Check-in date is required.
Check-out date is required.
